# Copilot Instructions

## Important
- Be Simple. Approach task in simple incremental way.
- Use latest versions of the packages and the apis as of now.
- Work incrementally in small steps and validate each step before moving on to next step.

## Important Coding style
- Dont Overengineer.
- Dont do defensive coding if there is a need ask me.
- Always use SOLID and Dry principles the most you can.
- Dont over comment the code only add comments where its needed or if something is hard to understand. Please never use emojis.
- Keep readme file concise.

## Important - debugging and fixing
- When troubleshooting an issue, ALWAYS identify the root cause before fixing.
- Reproduce consistently.
- PROVE the problem first dont guess.
- Try one test at a time.
- Dont jump to conclusions. Dont apply workarounds.
